mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refund_record(order_id, user_id, reason, refund_amount, fee_amount, status) VALUES(#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{reason}, #{refundAmount}, #{feeAmount}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, refund_amount, fee_amount, status, created_at FROM refund_record WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
